name: 13oz Stoneware DOING MY BEST Camper Mug - Room Essentials™
description:
Stay motivated during your outdoor adventures and beyond with this Camper Mug from Room Essentials™. Made of stoneware material, this camper mug features "Doing My Best" text on a blue backdrop. Designed with a capacity of 13 fluid ounces, this mug is suitable for various cold and hot beverages. Plus, it's dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
